titleStmt.title: SII 38.369: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 369. (A.R. No. 369 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the north wall, first prākāra, Bṛihadāmba temple.

p.hi: King: Kṛishṇadēva-Mahārāya Year: Śaka 1453. Virōdhi, Chittirai śu. 10 Attam Hasta = irregular.

summary.p: Records that the priests (gurukkaḷ) and temple officials (tāṉamāyēsurar), mudaliyaḷ and the ūrār of Gaṅgapuram gave the cultivating right (ūḻavukāṇiakshi) to the extent of 750 kuḻi of wet land (called) Dēvarāyaṉ paṭṭadai at Kīḻaikkaṅgapuram in Paṅgaḷanāḍu, a village which was owned by the temple (tirunāmakkāṇi) of Tirumalaruḍaiyanayiṉār at Dēvakkāpuram, to a certain Kōṉi Appanāyakkar, son of Timmaṇaṉāyakkar, the kaṉṉaḍiyaṉāyakkapāḍi of Dēvakkāpuram. It is also stipulated that he was free to cultivate any crop of his choice but was to remit a certain stipulated amount of paddy every year to the temple treasury.
Īśāṉa Śivachāriyār, tāṉattār, Māyēsvarar, the temple accountant Uttaṇḍi, who had this inscription engraved, the village accountant, Śivānadēvan, and others figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śuhastiśrīRead subhamastuśrī maṉ makāmaṇṭalecurametiṉi micura kaṇṭakaṭṭāri cāḷuva śrīvirappiṟutāpa kirukṣaṇaiyateva makāyirāyar piṟutivi yirā
cciyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa cakāttam 1000 4 100 5 10 3 mel cellā niṉṟa viroti varuṣam cittirai mātam pūṟuvapakṣamutalāka tecamiyum peṟṟa Attattu ṉāḷ
ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu palkuṉṟakoṭṭattu melkuṉṟa ṉāṭu yirācakempiraṉmalaikku Aṭuttapaṟṟu murukamaṅkalappaṟṟu tevastāṉam
tevakkāpuram tirumalar Uṭaiya nāyiṉār tiruṉāmakkāṇi Āṉa paṅkaḷa ṉāṭṭil
kiḻaikkaṅkapuram Eri Etuvāyi ṉāyakkaṉtāṅkal kiḻ tevarāyaṉ paṭṭaṭai nañcaiku 7 100 5 10 kurukkaḷum tāṉamāyecurarum mutaliyaḷum
kaṅkapuram Ūravarum meṟpaṭi Ūṟ kaṉṉaṭiyaṉāyakkapāṭi timmaṇaṉāyakkar makaṉ koṉi Appaṉāyakkaṟku Uḻavukāṇiākṣi paṇṇikkuṭuttom
yinta nilam tām veṇṭum payirceytu koṇṭum malaiyāṅkāṭṭu kuttakai Āka koyilpaṇṭārattukku varuṣam 1 kku �2 10ḷa 3 1000 mu varuṣam mu varuṣam toṟum
celutti tām veṇṭum payiṟceytu koṇṭu cukattileyirukka kaṭaivar Ākavumyintappaṭi cantirādhittavaraiyum naṭakkakaṭaivatākavum
Īśāna civācaāriyar Eḻuttu tāṉattār Eḻuttu māyecurar Eḻuttu kaḷappāḷar kāliṅkayirāyar vallāṉai veṉṟār Uḷḷiṭṭār Eḻuttu
yippaṭikku yintak kalveṭṭu Eḻutiṉamaikku koyilkaṇakku Uttaṇṭi Eḻuttu §
Ivai kaṅkayum Ūravar Eḻuttu Ūrkkaṇakkuccirāmatevaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 38.369 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
